notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly public/visible events (appearance of dog-tailed mink, destruction of formation, chase sequences) that are observable by multiple parties. No private knowledge, secret motives/plans, or future-known information is directly supported by the source pointers. The entities and relations are marked as 'ambiguous' visibility but the source text describes publicly occurring events. No hidden fact candidate can be extracted without speculative extrapolation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly scene descriptions, entity appearances, and chase sequences in ch_1283. Multiple characters appear (洪极子, 玄极子, 狗尾续命貂, 方源, 碧晨天, 雪胡老祖, etc.) but the seed facts only show observable actions (being dragged, chasing, fleeing, observing) without clear direct evidence of internal motives. For example: 狗尾续命貂 destroys the array and drags 洪极子/玄极子 - the observed action is clear but the inferred motive would be speculative (could be following orders from 南荒仙人, or acting on its own judgment). 方源 chases 影无邪 - observed action is pursuit but motive (capture/kill/question) is ambiguous from seed alone. 赵怜云撞向雪胡老祖 - observed action is collision but whether it's sacrifice or distraction is ambiguous. No character has enough direct source-backed evidence for a confident one-step motive inference without psychological leaps.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed contains mostly individual actors (洪极子, 玄极子, 方源, 碧晨天, etc.) and individual-level conflicts. The only named collective groups are '长生天八极子' (but only two named members appear, no collective stake), '中洲蛊仙' (appears as a group label but no collective stake or pressure axis), '大雪山魔道蛊仙' (mentioned as a group but no collective stake), and '大雪山峰主' (individuals). No named faction/clan/family has a concrete collective stake in the seed facts that would support a faction pressure candidate.
